LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE APRIL-02-2024 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF WILLIAM GARCIA'S NOTICE OF MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION AND PAGA SETTLEMENT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR PARTIES' NONCOMPLIANCE WITH LOCAL RULE 2.7(B) (COURTESY COPIES). THE MOTION MAY BE RE-SET FOR ANY MONDAY-THURSDAY AFTER APRIL 16 AFTER MEET-AND-CONFER WITH OPPOSING COUNSEL. NEW PAPERS SHALL REFLECT NEW HEARING DATE ON CAPTION PAGES. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE APRIL-17-2024 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF WILLIAM GARCIA'S MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION AND PAGA SETTLEMENT, THE COURT GRANTS THE MOTION. THE COURT FURTHER SCHEDULES A FINAL APPROVAL HEARING TO SEPTEMBER 5, 2024, AT 9:30 A.M. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2024 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-25-2024 Continued To Dec-18-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action And Paga Settlement; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Sep-05-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Jill J. Parker, Esq., PARKER & MINNE, LLP (310) 882-6833 jill@parkerminne.com Attorney for Plaintiff.
Vartan Madoyan. Esq., LAWYERS for JUSTICE, PC (818) 265-1020 Attorney for Plaintiff.
Karen A. Rooney, Esq., Karen Rooney Law 310-734-7449 krooney@rooneylawla.com Attorney for Defendant Rubylin, Inc.

Hearing is held. Discussed, not ARGUED. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WILLIAM GARCIA INDIVIDUALLY AND ON BEHALF OF OTHER MEMBERS OF THE GENERAL PUBLIC SIMILARLY SITUATED's Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action And Paga Settlement.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for final approval of class action and PAGA settlement" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

FINAL APPROVAL HEARING
Off Calendar Sep-05-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference

Vartan Madoyan. Esq., LAWYERS for JUSTICE, PC (818) 265-1020 Attorney for Plaintiff.
Karen A. Rooney, Esq., Karen Rooney Law 310-734-7449 krooney@rooneylawla.com Attorney for Defendant Rubylin, Inc.

Hearing is held. Discussed, not ARGUED.

FINAL APPROVAL HEARING.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for final approval of class action and PAGA settlement" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-25-2024 Continued To Oct-23-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

***Re-Notice*** Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action And Paga Settlement; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Apr-17-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. JILL PARKER, Esq. of Parker & Minne, LLP (tel: 310-882-6833) for Plaintiff.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF WILLIAM GARCIA's Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action And Paga Settlement.

Matter discussed. The Court inquires as to whether anybody opposses the motion. The Court grants the motion. The Court further schedules a final approval hearing to September 5, 2024 at 9:30 A.M.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action And Paga Settlement
Off Calendar Apr-02-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF WILLIAM GARCIA's Notice Of Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action And Paga Settlement.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Ordered off calendar for parties' noncompliance with Local Rule 2.7(B) (courtesy copies). The motion may be re-set for any Monday-Thursday after April 16 after meet-and-confer with opposing counsel. New papers shall reflect new hearing date on caption pages.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
